subject: Thanks for your application — Senior Engineer at Acme
body: Thanks for applying to the Senior Engineer role at Acme. Our team will review your application within the week.

subject: Re: Senior Engineer at Acme — recruiter screen?
body: Hi! We reviewed your application and would love to set up a 30-min recruiter screen. When works this week or next?

subject: Re: Senior Engineer at Acme — take-home
body: Great chat! As a next step, please complete this take-home by end of day Friday: https://acme.example/take-home/xyz. Estimate is ~3 hours.

subject: Re: Senior Engineer at Acme — onsite scheduling
body: Excellent take-home submission. We'd like to schedule the onsite (5 sessions, ~4 hours). Calendar invite to follow once you confirm times.
